metadata.title: HyperWhisper - AI Voice Transcription for macOS & Windows
metadata.description: Write 5x faster with AI-powered voice transcription. HyperWhisper transcribes your voice with incredible accuracy on macOS and Windows. Speak naturally and watch your words appear instantly.

hero.headline: Write, compose, and create
hero.subheadline: HyperWhisper transcribes your voice with incredible accuracy. Just speak naturally and watch your words appear instantly.

features.title: Built for professionals
features.subtitle: Every feature is designed to help you work faster and more efficiently

customVocabulary.title: Custom Vocabulary
customVocabulary.description: Add names, acronyms, and special terms for perfect accuracy every time.

languages.title: 100+ Languages
languages.description: Transcribe in over 100 languages with automatic language detection.

offline.title: Offline Support
offline.description: Works completely offline. Your data never leaves your device.

privacy.title: Privacy Focused
privacy.description: No account required. No tracking. Your voice data stays on your Mac or PC.

hybridProcessing.title: Hybrid Processing
hybridProcessing.description: Choose between local models for privacy or cloud APIs for speed. Best of both worlds.

customizable.title: Highly Customizable
customizable.description: Choose from over 9 API providers and 30+ transcription models.

realTime.title: Real-Time Streaming
realTime.description: See your words appear instantly as you speak. Industry-leading accuracy with sub-700ms latency.

fileImport.title: File Import
fileImport.description: Import audio or video files to transcribe. Supports all major formats with automatic silence detection.

screenOcr.title: Screen OCR
screenOcr.description: Allow HyperWhisper to see your screen so it can spell everything accurately.

mcpServer.title: Local API & MCP Server
mcpServer.description: Built-in MCP server lets Claude, Cursor, and other AI agents drive HyperWhisper. Local-only HTTP API with bearer auth for scripts and automations.

modes.title: Modes for every situation
modes.description: Switch between different transcription modes optimized for meetings, note-taking, emails, coding, and more. Each mode uses custom prompts to format your text perfectly.

pricing.title: No subscriptions. Ever.
pricing.subtitle: Pay once, use forever. We hate subscriptions too.

enterprise.title: Enterprise & Custom Pricing
enterprise.description: Volume discounts, SSO, priority support, in-house hosting, and custom integrations

faq.title: Frequently asked questions
faq.subtitle: Everything you need to know about HyperWhisper
faq.contactPrompt: Still have questions? Email us at

accuracy.question: How accurate is the transcription?
accuracy.answer: We achieve industry-leading 99% accuracy using state-of-the-art AI models. You can boost accuracy even further by adding your own custom vocabulary for technical terms, names, and specialized jargon.

offline.question: Can I use it without internet?
offline.answer: Absolutely. HyperWhisper can be used entirely offline on your Mac using local AI models - no internet required. For users who want maximum accuracy and speed, we also offer optional cloud processing via various cloud providers.

apiKey.question: Do I need to pay for API access?
apiKey.answer:
You bring your own API key for the following providers: Groq, xAI Grok, OpenAI, Deepgram, AssemblyAI, ElevenLabs, Mistral, and Google Gemini. Some providers offer free credits to new users; Deepgram offers $200, AssemblyAI offers $50. This works out significantly cheaper in the long-run than any subscription. 

You can also use HyperWhisper Cloud (built-in) which requires no API key and is pay-as-you-go.

But remember, the local offline mode works without any API key and is completely free.

languages.question: What languages does it support?
languages.answer: Over 100 languages are supported out of the box, from English and Spanish to Mandarin and Arabic. Most models can automatically detect which language you're speaking and switch seamlessly.

offlineModels.question: What offline models are available?
offlineModels.answer:
For offline transcription, we offer multiple sizes of the Whisper model (made by OpenAI, supporting 99+ languages). We also offer NVidia's Parakeet models (supporting 25+ languages).
      
      For offline post-processing, we offer multiple sizes of the Gemma 3 model (made by Google).

compatibility.question: Does it work with all Mac and Windows apps?
compatibility.answer: Yes, it works everywhere you can type. Whether you're composing emails, writing documents, coding, or chatting. Just hit the shortcut, speak, and watch your words appear instantly.

privacy.question: How is my privacy protected?
privacy.answer:
When using local mode, no data ever leaves your Mac.

When using cloud transcription, your data is sent to the cloud provider you choose (e.g., OpenAI, Groq, xAI Grok, Deepgram, AssemblyAI, ElevenLabs, Mistral, or Google Gemini).

You can verify this yourself with a network inspector such as [Proxyman](https://proxyman.io) or a network monitor like [Little Snitch](https://www.obdev.at/products/littlesnitch/index.html).

For a full breakdown of where audio goes and how to opt your own API keys out of model training, see our [Data Privacy guide](https://hyperwhisper.com/docs/data-privacy).

cloud.question: What is HyperWhisper Cloud?
cloud.answer:
HyperWhisper Cloud is a built-in cloud transcription aimed at less technical users who want to get started quickly.

It's pay as you go. Buying a license gives you $5 in transcription credits. You can add more credits later.
    
We offer four accuracy levels: Medium (Groq), Medium (Deepgram Nova 3), High (ElevenLabs Scribe v2), and Highest (Grok SST, default for new installs and powered by xAI Grok STT). Post-processing is automatic and defaults to Grok 4.1 Fast non-reasoning. We store nothing besides how many credits you consumed, and we've opted you out of model training on every upstream provider we use. See our [Data Privacy guide](https://hyperwhisper.com/docs/data-privacy) for details.

You pay exactly what we pay to these providers. We charge no markup.

For peace of mind, the entire app is open source under Apache-2.0 — including the Cloud backend. You can read every line of code that runs between your app and the providers we proxy to [on GitHub](https://github.com/ray-amjad/hyperwhisper-fly).

dataTraining.question: Will my voice data be used to train AI models?
dataTraining.answer: HyperWhisper Cloud opts you out of model training on every upstream provider we use. With your own API key, opt-out is your responsibility — see our [Data Privacy guide](https://hyperwhisper.com/docs/data-privacy).

lifetime.question: Why lifetime pricing instead of subscription?
lifetime.answer: We believe in simple, fair pricing. Pay once for $39 and use HyperWhisper forever. No monthly fees, no surprises. The free version lets you try key features with 5 minutes of daily transcription.

deviceLimit.question: How many devices can I use my license on?
deviceLimit.answer: You can use your license on as many devices as you like, subject to our Fair Usage Policy as outlined in our [Terms of Service](/legal/terms-of-service). This policy is designed to be flexible for legitimate personal and business use while preventing abuse.

requirements.question: What are the system requirements?
requirements.answer: For Mac: macOS 14 or newer, both Apple Silicon and Intel supported. For Windows: Windows 10/11, x64 or ARM64. 8GB RAM recommended for optimal performance.

windowsStatus.question: Does the Windows version have all the same features as macOS?
windowsStatus.answer: The Windows version was recently released, so it may not have all features available on macOS yet. We're actively working to bring full feature parity to both platforms.

madeBy.question: Who was this made by?
madeBy.answer: This was made by the YouTuber [Ray Amjad](https://www.youtube.com/@ramjad).

support.title: Support Center
support.subtitle: We're here to help you get the most out of HyperWhisper
support.description: For technical support, license issues, or any questions about HyperWhisper, our team is here to help.
support.responseTime: We typically respond within 24 hours during business days.
